creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
Horen Kuecuekyan on 2001-03-13 (Tue) at 09:01:55 -0500:
> 
> >Description:
> 
> 	omniORB's last release is 3.0.3 , the port covers the release
>         with the notification service.

I may be speaking out of turn here, but is it necessary to replicate the
entire omniORB port inside an "omniORB-Notify" port?  Can omniNotify not be a
separate port that merely depends on omniORB?  Can you maybe explain the
reasoning behind the way in which you put together a combined port like this?

-- Johann
